title: Restoring Large Database Backups on Shared Hosting
description: Shared hosting limits make restores painful. Here’s the most reliable workflow.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Shared hosts have low upload and execution limits. A single large dump almost always fails.
See also: **phpMyAdmin Upload Limit Too Small?**

content.title: Restore without limits
content.text: Split large backups into small, safe chunks.

faq.question: Is there a size limit for phpMyAdmin?
faq.answer: Yes. It varies by host and is often very low.
